name: 4 Pics 1 Word
author: Poki
description: 4 Pics 1 Word is a puzzle game created by Unico Studio. Guess what all the images have in common and discover the hidden word. Enjoy dozens of levels and put your skills to the test in this challenging puzzle game! How to play: Use your mouse cursor to select. About the creator: 4 Pics 1 Word is created by Unico Studio. Play their other game Brain Test: Tricky Puzzles on Poki!
